docs.text: OnTrackHockey Hockey SMS (Sports Management System) On-Track-Hockey is a sports management system for organizing and managing hockey data including players, teams, and leagues. The project is designed as a modern, containerized application with a clean separation between frontend, backend, and database layers. v0.21 screenshot of game event creation Stack Status Active development Getting Started Prerequisites Docker & Docker Compose or run from source Go Node.js PostgreSQL Run with Docker (recommended) docker compose up --build Frontend: http://localhost:8080 Backend: http://localhost:3000 Contributing Contributions are welcome, but please follow these guidelines: Keep pull requests small and focused on a single issue. Do not submit large AI-generated pull requests.
docs.title: Home

docs.text: Hockey SMS (Sports Management System) On-Track-Hockey is a sports management system for organizing and managing hockey data including players, teams, and leagues. The project is designed as a modern, containerized application with a clean separation between frontend, backend, and database layers. v0.21 screenshot of game event creation
docs.title: OnTrackHockey

docs.text: Active development
docs.title: Status

docs.text: Prerequisites Docker & Docker Compose or run from source Go Node.js PostgreSQL
docs.title: Getting Started

docs.text: docker compose up --build Frontend: http://localhost:8080 Backend: http://localhost:3000
docs.title: Run with Docker (recommended)

docs.text: Contributions are welcome, but please follow these guidelines: Keep pull requests small and focused on a single issue. Do not submit large AI-generated pull requests.
docs.title: Contributing

docs.text: Divisons Create a divison POST /divisions Request: { "league_id": 1, "name": "Div 1" } Response: { "division": { "id": 18, "league_id": 1, "name": "Div 1" } } View a division GET /division/{id} Example response: { "division": { "id": 1, "league_id": 1, "name": "Div 1" } } View all divisions GET /divisions Example response: { "divisions": [ { "id": 1, "league_id": 1, "name": "Div 1" }, { "id": 2, "league_id": 1, "name": "Div 2" }, ] } View all teams from a division GET /divisions/{division_id}/teams Example response: { "teams": [ { "id": 1, "full_name": "New York Rangers", "short_name": "NYR", "division_id": 1, "is_active": true }, { "id": 2, "full_name": "San Jose Sharks", "short_name": "SJS", "division_id": 1, "is_active": true } ] } Update a division PATCH /division/{id} Request: { "name": "AwesomeDiv" } Response: { "division": { "id": 2, "league_id": 1, "name": "AwesomeDiv" } } Delete a division DELETE /division/{id} Example response: { "message": "division successfully deleted" }
docs.title: Divisions

docs.text: POST /divisions Request: { "league_id": 1, "name": "Div 1" } Response: { "division": { "id": 18, "league_id": 1, "name": "Div 1" } }
docs.title: Create a divison

docs.text: GET /division/{id} Example response: { "division": { "id": 1, "league_id": 1, "name": "Div 1" } }
docs.title: View a division

docs.text: GET /divisions Example response: { "divisions": [ { "id": 1, "league_id": 1, "name": "Div 1" }, { "id": 2, "league_id": 1, "name": "Div 2" }, ] }
docs.title: View all divisions

docs.text: GET /divisions/{division_id}/teams Example response: { "teams": [ { "id": 1, "full_name": "New York Rangers", "short_name": "NYR", "division_id": 1, "is_active": true }, { "id": 2, "full_name": "San Jose Sharks", "short_name": "SJS", "division_id": 1, "is_active": true } ] }
docs.title: View all teams from a division

docs.text: PATCH /division/{id} Request: { "name": "AwesomeDiv" } Response: { "division": { "id": 2, "league_id": 1, "name": "AwesomeDiv" } }
docs.title: Update a division

docs.text: DELETE /division/{id} Example response: { "message": "division successfully deleted" }
docs.title: Delete a division

docs.text: Game Event Participants Create a game event participant POST /events/{event_id}/participants Request: { "role": "scorer", "player_id": 1, } Roles: scorer assist_primary assist_secondary penalty_take Response: { "game_event_participant": { "role": "assist_secondary", "event_id": 1, "player_id": 3 } }
docs.title: Game Event Participants

docs.text: POST /events/{event_id}/participants Request: { "role": "scorer", "player_id": 1, } Roles: scorer assist_primary assist_secondary penalty_take Response: { "game_event_participant": { "role": "assist_secondary", "event_id": 1, "player_id": 3 } }
docs.title: Create a game event participant

docs.text: Games Create a game event POST /games/{game_id}/events Request: { "period": 2, "clock_seconds": 360, "event_type": "penalty", "team_id": 2, "situation": "EV" } Event types: goal penalty shot save Situations: ev even strength pp powerplay sh short handed en empty net Response: { "game_events": { "id": 2, "event_number": 2, "game_id": 1, "period": 2, "clock_seconds": 12, "event_type": "penalty", "situation": "EV", "team_id": 2 } } View a game event GET /events/{id} Response: { "game_events": { "id": 1, "event_number": 1, "game_id": 1, "period": 2, "clock_seconds": 12, "event_type": "penalty", "situation": "EV", "team_id": 2 } }
docs.title: Game Events

docs.text: POST /games/{game_id}/events Request: { "period": 2, "clock_seconds": 360, "event_type": "penalty", "team_id": 2, "situation": "EV" } Event types: goal penalty shot save Situations: ev even strength pp powerplay sh short handed en empty net Response: { "game_events": { "id": 2, "event_number": 2, "game_id": 1, "period": 2, "clock_seconds": 12, "event_type": "penalty", "situation": "EV", "team_id": 2 } }
docs.title: Create a game event

docs.text: GET /events/{id} Response: { "game_events": { "id": 1, "event_number": 1, "game_id": 1, "period": 2, "clock_seconds": 12, "event_type": "penalty", "situation": "EV", "team_id": 2 } }
docs.title: View a game event

docs.text: Games is_finished : when a game is set to true with either via a POST or PATCH it currently triggers a full rebuild of the player stats. Temporarily this can also be manually triggered via GET /v0/updateStats . Create a game POST /games Request: { "home_team_id": 1, "away_team_id": 2, "start_time": "2026-03-10T19:30:00-05:00", "is_finished": false } Response: { "game": { "id": 2, "home_team_id": 1, "away_team_id": 2, "start_time": "2026-03-10T19:30:00-05:00", "is_finished": false } } Get all games GET /games Response: { "games": [ { "id": 1, "home_team": "NYR", "away_team": "SJS", "home_team_id": 1, "away_team_id": 2, "is_finished": false, "start_time": "2026-03-11T00:30:00Z" }, { "id": 2, "home_team": "NYR", "away_team": "SJS", "home_team_id": 1, "away_team_id": 2, "is_finished": true, "start_time": "2026-03-11T00:30:00Z" } ] } Edit a game PATCH /games/{id} Partial updates are accepted Request: { "home_team_id": 1, "away_team_id": 3, "is_finished": true } Response: { "game": { "id": 2, "home_team_id": 1, "away_team_id": 3, "start_time": "2026-03-10T19:30:00-05:00", "is_finished": true } } View a game GET /games/{id} Response: { "game": { "home_team": "NYR", "away_team": "SJS", "home_team_id": 1, "away_team_id": 2, "is_finished": false, "start_time": "2026-03-11T00:30:00Z", "game_events": [ { "id": 1, "event_number": 1, "period": 2, "clock_seconds": 12, "event_type": "penalty", "situation": "EV", "team_id": 2 }, { "id": 2, "event_number": 2, "period": 2, "clock_seconds": 12, "event_type": "penalty", "situation": "EV", "team_id": 2 } ] } }
docs.title: Games

docs.text: is_finished : when a game is set to true with either via a POST or PATCH it currently triggers a full rebuild of the player stats. Temporarily this can also be manually triggered via GET /v0/updateStats .
docs.title: Games

docs.text: POST /games Request: { "home_team_id": 1, "away_team_id": 2, "start_time": "2026-03-10T19:30:00-05:00", "is_finished": false } Response: { "game": { "id": 2, "home_team_id": 1, "away_team_id": 2, "start_time": "2026-03-10T19:30:00-05:00", "is_finished": false } }
docs.title: Create a game

docs.text: GET /games Response: { "games": [ { "id": 1, "home_team": "NYR", "away_team": "SJS", "home_team_id": 1, "away_team_id": 2, "is_finished": false, "start_time": "2026-03-11T00:30:00Z" }, { "id": 2, "home_team": "NYR", "away_team": "SJS", "home_team_id": 1, "away_team_id": 2, "is_finished": true, "start_time": "2026-03-11T00:30:00Z" } ] }
docs.title: Get all games

docs.text: PATCH /games/{id} Partial updates are accepted Request: { "home_team_id": 1, "away_team_id": 3, "is_finished": true } Response: { "game": { "id": 2, "home_team_id": 1, "away_team_id": 3, "start_time": "2026-03-10T19:30:00-05:00", "is_finished": true } }
docs.title: Edit a game

docs.text: GET /games/{id} Response: { "game": { "home_team": "NYR", "away_team": "SJS", "home_team_id": 1, "away_team_id": 2, "is_finished": false, "start_time": "2026-03-11T00:30:00Z", "game_events": [ { "id": 1, "event_number": 1, "period": 2, "clock_seconds": 12, "event_type": "penalty", "situation": "EV", "team_id": 2 }, { "id": 2, "event_number": 2, "period": 2, "clock_seconds": 12, "event_type": "penalty", "situation": "EV", "team_id": 2 } ] } }
docs.title: View a game

docs.text: Leagues Create a league POST /leagues { "name": "NHL" } View a league GET /leagues/{id} Example response: { "league": { "id": 2, "name": "NHL" } } View all leagues GET /leagues Example response: { "leagues": [ { "id": 1, "name": "AHL" }, { "id": 2, "name": "NHL" } ] } View all divisions in a league GET /v1/leagues/{league_id}/divisions { "divisions": [ { "id": 1, "league_id": 1, "name": "DIV1" }, { "id": 2, "league_id": 1, "name": "DIV2" } ] } Update a league PATCH /leagues/{id} { "name": "KHL" } Delete a league DELETE /leagues/{id} Example response: { "message": "league successfully deleted" }
docs.title: Leagues

docs.text: POST /leagues { "name": "NHL" }
docs.title: Create a league

docs.text: GET /leagues/{id} Example response: { "league": { "id": 2, "name": "NHL" } }
docs.title: View a league

docs.text: GET /leagues Example response: { "leagues": [ { "id": 1, "name": "AHL" }, { "id": 2, "name": "NHL" } ] }
docs.title: View all leagues

docs.text: GET /v1/leagues/{league_id}/divisions { "divisions": [ { "id": 1, "league_id": 1, "name": "DIV1" }, { "id": 2, "league_id": 1, "name": "DIV2" } ] }
docs.title: View all divisions in a league

docs.text: PATCH /leagues/{id} { "name": "KHL" }
docs.title: Update a league

docs.text: DELETE /leagues/{id} Example response: { "message": "league successfully deleted" }
docs.title: Delete a league

docs.text: Players Create a player POST /players Request: { "first_name": "Igor", "last_name": "Shesterkin", "sweater_number": 31, "position": "G", "birth_date": "1995-12-30", "birth_country": "RUS", "shoots_catches": "L", "current_team_id": 1, "is_active": true } Response: { "player": { "id": 35, "is_active": true, "current_team_id": 1, "first_name": "Igor", "last_name": "Shesterkin", "sweater_number": 31, "position": "G", "birth_date": "1995-12-30", "birth_country": "RUS", "shoots_catches": "L" } } View a player GET /player/{id} Response: { "player": { "id": 2, "is_active": true, "current_team_id": 2, "first_name": "Macklin", "last_name": "Celebrini", "sweater_number": 71, "position": "C", "birth_date": "2006-05-12", "birth_country": "CAN", "shoots_catches": "L", "skater_stats": { "current_season": { "games_played": 1, "goals": 0, "assists": 1, "points": 1, "pim": 0 }, "career_totals": { "games_played": 1, "goals": 0, "assists": 1, "points": 1, "pim": 0 } }, "team_full_name": "San Jose Sharks", "team_short_name": "SJS" } } Notes: Stats are returned on GET /players/{id} when a row exists in player_stats . Stats stay basic for now GET /v0/updateStats rebuilds stats Right now it only does skater stats View all players needs to be updated, there are filters / pagination GET /players Response: { "metadata": { "current_page": 1, "page_size": 20, "first_page": 1, "last_page": 1, "total_records": 2 }, "players": [ { "id": 1, "version": 1, "is_active": true, "current_team_id": 1, "first_name": "Igor", "last_name": "Shesterkin", "sweater_number": 31, "position": "G", "birth_date": "1995-12-30", "birth_country": "RUS", "shoots_catches": "L", "team_full_name": "New York Rangers", "team_short_name": "NYR" }, { "id": 2, "version": 1, "is_active": true, "current_team_id": 2, "first_name": "Macklin", "last_name": "Celebrini", "sweater_number": 71, "position": "C", "birth_date": "2006-05-12", "birth_country": "CAN", "shoots_catches": "L", "team_full_name": "San Jose Sharks", "team_short_name": "SJS" }, ] } Update a player PATCH /player/{id} Request: { "first_name": "Connor", "last_name": "McDavid", "sweater_number": 31, "position": "G", "birth_date": "1995-12-30", "birth_country": "RUS", "shoots_catches": "L", "current_team_id": 1, "is_active": true } Response: { "player": { "id": 1, "version": 3, "is_active": true, "current_team_id": 1, "first_name": "Connor", "last_name": "McDavid", "sweater_number": 31, "position": "G", "birth_date": "1995-12-30", "birth_country": "RUS", "shoots_catches": "L" } } Delete a player DELETE /player/{id} Example response: { "message": "player successfully deleted" }
docs.title: Players

docs.text: POST /players Request: { "first_name": "Igor", "last_name": "Shesterkin", "sweater_number": 31, "position": "G", "birth_date": "1995-12-30", "birth_country": "RUS", "shoots_catches": "L", "current_team_id": 1, "is_active": true } Response: { "player": { "id": 35, "is_active": true, "current_team_id": 1, "first_name": "Igor", "last_name": "Shesterkin", "sweater_number": 31, "position": "G", "birth_date": "1995-12-30", "birth_country": "RUS", "shoots_catches": "L" } }
docs.title: Create a player

docs.text: GET /player/{id} Response: { "player": { "id": 2, "is_active": true, "current_team_id": 2, "first_name": "Macklin", "last_name": "Celebrini", "sweater_number": 71, "position": "C", "birth_date": "2006-05-12", "birth_country": "CAN", "shoots_catches": "L", "skater_stats": { "current_season": { "games_played": 1, "goals": 0, "assists": 1, "points": 1, "pim": 0 }, "career_totals": { "games_played": 1, "goals": 0, "assists": 1, "points": 1, "pim": 0 } }, "team_full_name": "San Jose Sharks", "team_short_name": "SJS" } } Notes: Stats are returned on GET /players/{id} when a row exists in player_stats . Stats stay basic for now GET /v0/updateStats rebuilds stats Right now it only does skater stats
docs.title: View a player

docs.text: needs to be updated, there are filters / pagination GET /players Response: { "metadata": { "current_page": 1, "page_size": 20, "first_page": 1, "last_page": 1, "total_records": 2 }, "players": [ { "id": 1, "version": 1, "is_active": true, "current_team_id": 1, "first_name": "Igor", "last_name": "Shesterkin", "sweater_number": 31, "position": "G", "birth_date": "1995-12-30", "birth_country": "RUS", "shoots_catches": "L", "team_full_name": "New York Rangers", "team_short_name": "NYR" }, { "id": 2, "version": 1, "is_active": true, "current_team_id": 2, "first_name": "Macklin", "last_name": "Celebrini", "sweater_number": 71, "position": "C", "birth_date": "2006-05-12", "birth_country": "CAN", "shoots_catches": "L", "team_full_name": "San Jose Sharks", "team_short_name": "SJS" }, ] }
docs.title: View all players

docs.text: PATCH /player/{id} Request: { "first_name": "Connor", "last_name": "McDavid", "sweater_number": 31, "position": "G", "birth_date": "1995-12-30", "birth_country": "RUS", "shoots_catches": "L", "current_team_id": 1, "is_active": true } Response: { "player": { "id": 1, "version": 3, "is_active": true, "current_team_id": 1, "first_name": "Connor", "last_name": "McDavid", "sweater_number": 31, "position": "G", "birth_date": "1995-12-30", "birth_country": "RUS", "shoots_catches": "L" } }
docs.title: Update a player

docs.text: DELETE /player/{id} Example response: { "message": "player successfully deleted" }
docs.title: Delete a player

docs.text: Roster View a team's roster GET /roster/{team_id} Request: { "roster": { "forwards": [ { "id": 2, "is_active": true, "current_team_id": 2, "first_name": "Macklin", "last_name": "Celebrini", "sweater_number": 71, "position": "C", "birth_date": "2006-05-12", "birth_country": "CAN", "shoots_catches": "L" }, { "id": 7, "is_active": true, "current_team_id": 2, "first_name": "William", "last_name": "Eklund", "sweater_number": 72, "position": "LW", "birth_date": "2002-10-12", "birth_country": "SWE", "shoots_catches": "L" }, { "id": 8, "is_active": true, "current_team_id": 2, "first_name": "Fabian", "last_name": "Zetterlund", "sweater_number": 20, "position": "RW", "birth_date": "1999-08-25", "birth_country": "SWE", "shoots_catches": "L" } ], "defensemen": [ { "id": 6, "is_active": true, "current_team_id": 2, "first_name": "Mario", "last_name": "Ferraro", "sweater_number": 38, "position": "D", "birth_date": "1998-09-17", "birth_country": "CAN", "shoots_catches": "L" } ], "goalies": [ { "id": 9, "is_active": true, "current_team_id": 2, "first_name": "Mackenzie", "last_name": "Blackwood", "sweater_number": 29, "position": "G", "birth_date": "1996-12-09", "birth_country": "CAN", "shoots_catches": "L" } ] } }
docs.title: Roster

docs.text: GET /roster/{team_id} Request: { "roster": { "forwards": [ { "id": 2, "is_active": true, "current_team_id": 2, "first_name": "Macklin", "last_name": "Celebrini", "sweater_number": 71, "position": "C", "birth_date": "2006-05-12", "birth_country": "CAN", "shoots_catches": "L" }, { "id": 7, "is_active": true, "current_team_id": 2, "first_name": "William", "last_name": "Eklund", "sweater_number": 72, "position": "LW", "birth_date": "2002-10-12", "birth_country": "SWE", "shoots_catches": "L" }, { "id": 8, "is_active": true, "current_team_id": 2, "first_name": "Fabian", "last_name": "Zetterlund", "sweater_number": 20, "position": "RW", "birth_date": "1999-08-25", "birth_country": "SWE", "shoots_catches": "L" } ], "defensemen": [ { "id": 6, "is_active": true, "current_team_id": 2, "first_name": "Mario", "last_name": "Ferraro", "sweater_number": 38, "position": "D", "birth_date": "1998-09-17", "birth_country": "CAN", "shoots_catches": "L" } ], "goalies": [ { "id": 9, "is_active": true, "current_team_id": 2, "first_name": "Mackenzie", "last_name": "Blackwood", "sweater_number": 29, "position": "G", "birth_date": "1996-12-09", "birth_country": "CAN", "shoots_catches": "L" } ] } }
docs.title: View a team's roster

docs.text: Teams Create a team POST /teams Request: { "full_name": "New York Rangers", "short_name": "NYR", "division_id": 1, "is_active": true } Response: { "team": { "id": 3, "full_name": "New York Rangers", "short_name": "NYR", "division_id": 1, "is_active": true } } Get a team GET /teams/{id} Response: { "team": { "id": 1, "version": 2, "full_name": "New York", "short_name": "NYR", "division_id": 1, "is_active": false } } Get all teams GET /teams Response: { "teams": [ { "id": 1, "version": 0, "full_name": "New York Rangers", "short_name": "NYR", "division_id": 1, "is_active": true }, { "id": 2, "version": 0, "full_name": "San Jose Sharks", "short_name": "SJS", "division_id": 1, "is_active": true } ] } Edit a Team PATCH /teams/{id} Partial updates are accepted Request: { "full_name": "New York Rangers", "short_name": "NYR", "division_id": 1, "is_active": true } Response: { "team": { "id": 1, "full_name": "New York", "short_name": "NYR", "division_id": 1, "is_active": false } } Delete a team DELETE /teams/{id} Response: { "message": "team successfully deleted" }
docs.title: Teams

docs.text: POST /teams Request: { "full_name": "New York Rangers", "short_name": "NYR", "division_id": 1, "is_active": true } Response: { "team": { "id": 3, "full_name": "New York Rangers", "short_name": "NYR", "division_id": 1, "is_active": true } }
docs.title: Create a team

docs.text: GET /teams/{id} Response: { "team": { "id": 1, "version": 2, "full_name": "New York", "short_name": "NYR", "division_id": 1, "is_active": false } }
docs.title: Get a team

docs.text: GET /teams Response: { "teams": [ { "id": 1, "version": 0, "full_name": "New York Rangers", "short_name": "NYR", "division_id": 1, "is_active": true }, { "id": 2, "version": 0, "full_name": "San Jose Sharks", "short_name": "SJS", "division_id": 1, "is_active": true } ] }
docs.title: Get all teams

docs.text: PATCH /teams/{id} Partial updates are accepted Request: { "full_name": "New York Rangers", "short_name": "NYR", "division_id": 1, "is_active": true } Response: { "team": { "id": 1, "full_name": "New York", "short_name": "NYR", "division_id": 1, "is_active": false } }
docs.title: Edit a Team

docs.text: DELETE /teams/{id} Response: { "message": "team successfully deleted" }
docs.title: Delete a team
